titles.title: Romans 16: 19 (Be Excellent of What Is Good)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Be excellent in what is good, Be innocent of evil, Be excellent in what is good, Be innocent of evil.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And the God of Peace will soon crush Satan God will crush him underneath your feet! And the God of Peace will soon crush Satan God will crush him underneath your feet!
